title: radiogrammitis plana
intro: Radiogrammitis plana, also known as the flat rock fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand, characterized by its flat or slightly undulating fronds. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Radiogrammitis plana include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Radiogrammitis plana can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant in tincture or salve form to apply topically.
